sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Upna bek tawh i ngah theih thupha lamdang lua hi;
Zan ni, tuni, a tawntung Jesuh kikhel lo
hi;
Mawh neite gum nuam, cinate zong damsak nuam den;
Adah mite lung nuamsak hi, A minthang
tahen!

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Zanni, tuni le a tawntung Jesuh kikhel lo,
Na dang khempeuh a kikhel hang
Jesuh kikhel lo!

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Mawhneite lawm bawlin gum nuam a, a hong zong Pa;
Tu’n zuan
in, kisikna tawh kuunin A khe phungah;
“Thu hong khen kei ning, na mawh nawn ke’n”
aci Pa in;
Na mawhna hong maisak nuam hi tanglai mah bangin.

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Leitunga om lai,
Jesuh’n cinate damsak hi;
I natnate A thupiakna tawh dam thei lai hi;
Numei khat in A puan
mong a lawn ciang dampah hi;
Tua bang upna mah tawh nang zong hong damsak thei hi.
